title: Consolida saccata
taxonomy: Consolida saccata is classified as a species within the genus Consolida, which is part of the Ranunculaceae family. This family includes a variety of flowering plants commonly known as buttercups, anemones, or ranunculuses. The genus Consolida is a group of annual or biennial plants native to various parts of the world, including Europe and Asia. Consolida saccata is one of the species within this genus, but specific classification details may vary depending on the source.
